title: MikroTik R11e-2HPnD 802.11b/g/n High Power miniPCI-e card, 2x MMCX
category: MikroTik / Wireless / MiniPCI cards / MiniPCI Express
description: R11e-2HPnD is our new 802.11b/g/n Dual Chain high power 1000mW miniPCI-e card, operating in full 2192-2732 MHz frequency. Ideally suited for the new RB912 series, RB800 or our new miniPCIe adapters - RB14e/RB14eU. Unit is equipped with two MMCX connectors
specsSearch: Wireless features Sensitivity [dBm] 96 Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 30 Security 802.11X authentication, 64/128/152Bit WEP, IEEE802.11i encryption Connectors and Interfaces Bus type miniPCI-e RF connectors (2) MMCX Power Max. power consumption [W] 7 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 30 up to 65 Width [mm] 30 Height [mm] 13 Depth [mm] 51
